name: obsidian-vault
description: Codex workflows for saving, syncing, and organizing notes in the personal Obsidian vault.

interface.shortDescription: Save and sync personal vault notes
interface.longDescription: Adds Codex commands, an agent, and a note-taking skill for working with the personal Obsidian vault through the local Obsidian MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Wrap up this session into Obsidian
Save this as a note in my vault
